title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bank of Baroda - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bank of Baroda - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bank of Baroda! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bank of Baroda:
Bank of Baroda is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of Baroda!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
